product_overview: Student-facing review and practice features that let authenticated students view solutions, switch question language between English and Hindi, and re-attempt questions during review to practice and reinforce learning.
core_goals: Allow students to review past test questions with explanations to learn from mistakes
Let students switch question and option text between English and Hindi while reviewing solutions
Enable students to re-attempt questions in review mode for additional practice and immediate reinforcement

features.name: Language Switching
features.description: Allow an authenticated student to change the displayed language (English / Hindi) for question text and options while reviewing a completed attempt.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Log in with student credentials -> Open a completed test attempt's review -> Click on Language dropdown in header -> Select Hindi -> Observe question and option text changing language

Navigate to /login -> Log in with student credentials -> Open a completed test attempt's review -> Click on Language dropdown in header -> Select English -> Observe question and option text reverting to English

features.name: Re-attempt Mode
features.description: Permit a student to enable a re-attempt mode while reviewing a past attempt so they can answer questions again and practice without affecting the original attempt record.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Log in with student credentials -> Open a completed test attempt's review -> Toggle Re-attempt mode switch in footer -> Click on options to select them for a question -> Submit re-attempt answers -> See re-attempt feedback or updated attempt summary for the re-attempt

Navigate to /login -> Log in with student credentials -> Open a completed test attempt's review -> Toggle Re-attempt mode switch in footer -> Attempt to submit a question without selecting any option -> See a validation message prompting to select at least one option

features.name: View Solution
features.description: Keep correct answers and explanations hidden by default and reveal them only when the student requests to view the solution for a particular question during review.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Log in with student credentials -> Open a completed test attempt's review -> Click "View Solution" button for a question -> See correct answer and explanation displayed for that question

Navigate to /login -> Log in with student credentials -> Open a completed test attempt's review -> Click "View Solution" button for multiple questions sequentially -> Observe each question's correct answer and explanation revealed on request

routes.description: Solution review page with re-attempt mode

features.name: Language Switching
features.description: Toggle between English and Hindi for questions and options
user_interactions: Click on Language dropdown in header
Observe question and option text changing language

features.name: Re-attempt Mode
features.description: Allow users to solve questions again in review mode
user_interactions: Toggle Re-attempt mode switch in footer
Click on options to select them

features.name: View Solution
features.description: Hide solutions until requested by user
user_interactions: Click "View Solution" button for a question
